origins_overhaul.presentation.phantom.ph: Become intangible and move through the world as a phantom.
origins_overhaul.presentation.phantom.su: Direct sunlight is dangerous while you are a phantom.
origins_overhaul.presentation.phantom.hu: Your phantom abilities gradually increase hunger.
origins_overhaul.selection.preview_edito: Click a cell to place the selected eye. Tab switches eyes.
origins_overhaul.presentation.elytrian.f: You can glide, launch into the air, and fight more effectively while airborne.
origins_overhaul.presentation.elytrian.c: Tight spaces cause negative effects for you.
origins_overhaul.presentation.elytrian.f: Heavy armor is unavailable and kinetic damage is more dangerous.
origins_overhaul.presentation.arachnid.w: You can climb walls and interact with cobwebs more effectively.
origins_overhaul.presentation.arachnid.a: You have the special properties of an arthropod.
origins_overhaul.presentation.avian.flig: You fall slowly, move better through the air, and benefit from fresh air.
You are immune to fire, begin in the Nether, and attack more effectively while burning.
Fire and lava grant you an advantage.
Snowballs and some potions deal additional damage to you.
origins_overhaul.presentation.enderian.e: You can throw ender pearls and interact with blocks from farther away.
origins_overhaul.presentation.enderian.v: Water and some potions are dangerous to you.
origins_overhaul.presentation.enderian.p: Wearing a pumpkin obstructs your vision.
origins_overhaul.presentation.feline.mob: You are immune to fall damage and jump better while sprinting.
origins_overhaul.presentation.feline.pre: You move quietly, see in the dark, and scare creepers away.
origins_overhaul.presentation.feline.wea: You cannot use some heavy items.
origins_overhaul.presentation.merling.aq: You see and move well underwater, breathe there, and gain conduit power.
origins_overhaul.presentation.merling.ai: Potions can temporarily provide you with air.
origins_overhaul.presentation.shulk.shel: You carry more items, are better protected, and have stronger arms.
origins_overhaul.presentation.shulk.limi: You cannot use shields and exhaust yourself more quickly.
